title: H-A2 independent validation-data feasibility preregistration
purpose: Pre-register a no-paid feasibility plan for independent H-A2 validation data before any paid data, IBKR request, exact replay, paper trading, or E2 claim.
source_decision_summary: H-A2.34 preserved the timestamp-clean 09:35-only rule and threshold 0.001. Leave-one-out and skip-cost checks remain directionally useful, but retained OOS has only 14 trade days and no high-VIX retained bucket. The next safe step is independent validation-data planning or no-paid validation feasibility.
research_question: What independent validation dataset would be needed to test H-A2 without relying on the current 14 retained OOS days, and can that dataset be planned or partially sourced without paid data first?

allowed_inputs.use: control the latest H-A2 decision, sample gaps, high-VIX missing bucket, and forbidden next claims
measure current closed-trade count, candidate-day count, and sample adequacy blocker
record current cost headroom and prove this plan does not approve spending
identify macro-calendar coverage already available for validation planning
identify volatility-regime coverage already available for validation planning
inspect already-written Databento estimates or manifests only; do not call a provider

forbidden_inputs.reason: This is a feasibility preregistration, not a purchase authorization.
Provider calls are not needed to define the validation data plan.
IBKR exact replay remains blocked until local TWS/Gateway is available and separately authorized by plan.
H-L1 remains blocked until real timestamp-clean news cases exist.
News collection is a separate blocked branch and should not be mixed into H-A2 validation planning.
Validation planning must not become another OOS tuning pass.

planned_future_checks.question: Which exact gaps prevent H-A2 from moving beyond E1 after H-A2.34?
What independent validation target would fairly test the locked 09:35 H-A2 signal?
Can any already-local or no-paid source provide useful validation coverage before spending money?
If no-paid validation is insufficient, what paid data decision tree would be required later?
Should H-A2 proceed to a no-paid validation scan, a paid-cost estimate plan, exact-replay planning, or parking?

proceed_to_no_paid_validation_scan_if: At least one already-local or free source can add independent dates without provider calls.
The scan can be pre-registered without changing threshold 0.001 or adding OOS-selected filters.
The scan answers a named sample or regime gap from H-A2.34.
proceed_to_paid_cost_estimate_plan_if: No-paid sources cannot cover the required validation gap.
The missing fields and date/regime windows are narrow enough to estimate before purchase.
The cost guard can be checked before any provider call or download.
proceed_to_exact_replay_plan_if: Validation feasibility shows exact entry/exit replay is the binding gap rather than regime/sample coverage.
Required underlying bars and option quotes are identified by date and field.
The plan preserves the locked 09:35 signal and does not reuse delayed-entry PnL.
park_h_a2_if: Feasible validation coverage cannot reach a meaningful MinTRL/PSR path under current constraints.
Required high-VIX or regime buckets are unavailable without disproportionate cost.
The locked signal cannot be tested independently without OOS tuning.

allowed_claims: H-A2 has a pre-registered independent validation-data feasibility plan.
The plan may identify no-paid or later paid validation paths.
The plan may only produce E0 planning evidence until a future diagnostic run completes.
The plan preserves the locked 09:35-only H-A2 signal and threshold 0.001.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not run exact replay from this preregistration.
Do not buy paid data from this preregistration.
Do not call live Databento estimates from this preregistration.
Do not request IBKR bars from this preregistration.
Do not call LLMs from this preregistration.
Do not retry GDELT from this preregistration.
Do not add a new OOS-selected filter.
future_run_completion_criteria: The future run inventories current H-A2 validation gaps from H-A2.34.
The future run defines independent validation target periods, required fields, and required regimes.
The future run reports no-paid source feasibility before any paid or provider action.
The future run preserves the 09:35-only signal and threshold 0.001.
The future run selects one next action and caps claims at E1 or lower.
If the future run completes as a real diagnostic experiment, write research log 033.
tier_blockers: No high-VIX retained validation coverage yet
